name: CMBC Capital Holdings Limited
summary: CMBC Capital Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides loan financing services primarily in Hong Kong. It operates through Securities; Investment and Financing; and Asset Management, Corporate Finance and Advisory segments. The Securities segment offers brokerage, securities margin financing, futures and options contracts dealing, and securities underwriting/placing services. The Investment and Financing segment invests and trades in equity and debt securities, bonds, and funds. The Asset Management and Advisory segment provides asset management, sponsorship, and financial advisory and arrangement services. It also offers corporate financing services. The company was formerly known as Skyway Securities Group Limited and changed its name to CMBC Capital Holdings Limited in May 2017. The company is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong. CMBC Capital Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of CMBC International Investment Limited.
